mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS WHERE STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED')

SELECT PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId , PO.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount , PO.STATUS AS status , PO.CREATED_AT AS createdAt
, MIN(POI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT) || CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN ' 외 ' || (COUNT(*) - 1) || '건' ELSE '' END AS materialSummary FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS PO JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI ON PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID WHERE PO.STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED')
AND PO.STATUS = #{status}
GROUP BY PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID , PO.TOTAL_AMOUNT , PO.ORDER_MEMO , PO.STATUS , PO.CREATED_AT , PO.UPDATED_AT , PO.STORE_ID ORDER BY PO.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT RECEIPT_ID AS receiptId, RECEIPT_MEMO AS receiptMemo, RECEIVED_AT AS receivedAt, PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId FROM RECEIPTS ORDER BY RECEIPT_ID DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_RECEIPT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RECEIPTS ( RECEIPT_ID, RECEIPT_MEMO, RECEIVED_AT, PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) VALUES ( #{receiptId}, #{receiptMemo}, SYSDATE, #{purchaseOrderId} )

INSERT INTO RECEIPT_ITEMS ( RECEIPT_ITEM_ID, RECEIVED_QUANTITY, DEFECT_QUANTITY, RECEIPT_ITEM_MEMO, RECEIPT_ID, PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_RECEIPT_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{receivedQuantity}, #{defectQuantity}, #{receiptItemMemo}, #{receiptId}, #{purchaseOrderItemId} )

SELECT SEQ_INV_TX.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO INVENTORY_TRANSACTIONS ( INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID, TRANSACTION_TYPE, REASON, TRANSACTION_MEMO, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, STORE_ID, RECEIPT_ID, STORE_CLOSING_ID ) VALUES ( #{inventoryTransactionId}, 'RECEIPT', '발주 입고 처리', NULL, SYSDATE, #{createdBy}, #{storeId}, #{receiptId}, NULL )

INSERT INTO INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ITEMS ( INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ITEM_ID, BEFORE_QUANTITY, AFTER_QUANTITY, INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID, STORE_INVENTORY_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_INV_TX_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{beforeQuantity}, #{afterQuantity}, #{inventoryTransactionId}, #{storeInventoryId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE PURCHASE_ORDERS SET STATUS = 'RECEIVED', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseOrderId}
mapper.select: SELECT RECEIPT_ID AS receiptId, RECEIPT_MEMO AS receiptMemo, RECEIVED_AT AS receivedAt, PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId FROM RECEIPTS WHERE RECEIPT_ID = #{receiptId}

SELECT M.MATERIAL_CODE AS materialCode, M.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, M.MATERIAL_TYPE AS materialType, M.SUPPLY_PRICE AS supplyPrice, POI.REQUEST_QUANTITY AS requestQuantity, RI.RECEIVED_QUANTITY AS receivedQuantity, RI.DEFECT_QUANTITY AS defectQuantity, RI.RECEIPT_ITEM_MEMO AS receiptItemMemo, M.SUPPLY_PRICE * RI.RECEIVED_QUANTITY AS amount FROM RECEIPT_ITEMS RI JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI ON RI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID = POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID JOIN MATERIALS M ON POI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID WHERE RI.RECEIPT_ID = #{receiptId} ORDER BY RI.RECEIPT_ITEM_ID

SELECT POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID AS purchaseOrderItemId, M.MATERIAL_CODE AS materialCode, M.MATERIAL_TYPE AS materialType, POI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT AS materialName, POI.REQUEST_QUANTITY AS approvedQuantity, POI.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT AS supplyPrice, POI.REQUEST_QUANTITY * POI.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT AS amount FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI JOIN MATERIALS M ON POI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID WHERE POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseId} ORDER BY POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID
